name: Goal Planner
metaTitle: Goal Planner — SIP Amount Per Financial Goal | c7xai
metaDescription: Calculate the monthly SIP needed for each financial goal. Add multiple goals, adjust timelines. Client-side, no PII.

faq.question: How much SIP do I need for ₹1 crore?
faq.answer: At 12% returns, you need approximately ₹10,000/month for 20 years to reach ₹1 crore. At 10%, you need ₹13,200/month. The Goal Planner lets you set multiple goals with different timelines.

faq.question: How do I plan for multiple goals?
faq.answer: Add each goal separately — house down payment, children's education, retirement — with its own target amount and timeline. The planner shows the monthly SIP needed for each goal independently.

howToSteps.name: Add a goal
howToSteps.text: Click '+ Add Goal' and enter target amount and years

howToSteps.name: Set expected returns
howToSteps.text: Adjust the expected return rate for each goal

howToSteps.name: See monthly SIP needed
howToSteps.text: View how much to invest monthly for each goal

howToSteps.name: Compare scenarios
howToSteps.text: Adjust timelines and rates to see different outcomes
